name: rowspire
description: Rowspire - Browser strategy game with AI opponents

scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm-assets && npm run generate:sw && vite
scripts.build: rm -rf out && npm run lint && npm run build:app && npm run brand:audit
scripts.build:app: npm run build:wasm-assets && npm run generate:sw && npm run type-check && vite build && npm run audit:bundle
scripts.build:wasm: rm -rf public/wasm && cd worker && wasm-pack build --mode no-install --release --target web --out-dir ../public/wasm --locked --features wasm
scripts.build:wasm-assets: npm run build:wasm && rm -rf public/ml && mkdir -p public/ml/data/genetic_params public/ml/data/weights && cp resources/ai/evolved.json public/ml/data/genetic_params/ && cp resources/ai/ml_ai_weights_best.json public/ml/data/weights/
scripts.nuke: rm -rf out .wrangler node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.check: rm -rf out && npm run lint && npm run lint:rust && npm run check:types && npm run type-check && npm run test:rust && (cd worker && NUM_GAMES=4 cargo test --test ai_matrix_test test_ai_matrix -- --ignored --exact --nocapture) && npm run test:coverage && npm run check:diagrams && npm run build:app && npm run brand:audit && npm run test:e2e:built
scripts.check:slow: rm -rf out && npm run lint && npm run lint:rust && npm run check:types && npm run type-check && npm run test:rust && (cd worker && RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 cargo test --features slow_tests -- --include-ignored --nocapture) && npm run test:coverage && npm run check:diagrams && npm run build:app && npm run brand:audit && npm run test:e2e:built
scripts.test:rust:slow: cd worker && RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 cargo test --features slow_tests -- --nocapture
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:built
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config out/rowspire_main/wrangler.json
scripts.train: cd worker && caffeinate -dimsu cargo run --release --bin train --features training
